/usr/bin/cc  -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fPIC --target=arm64-apple-macosx -mmacosx-version-min=26.2 -w -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -funroll-loops -flto -DDISABLE_BOUNDS_CHECKS -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/aeronmd.dir/aeronmd.c.o -o ../../../../binaries/aeronmd  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/xavier/Code/poc_rust_rusteron/target/release/build/rusteron-media-driver-728cef9bc73d8d64/out/build/lib ../../../../lib/libaeron_driver.dylib
